name: io.github.aryaminus/astro
description: Multi-tradition astrology. 19 modes, 18 tools. Deterministic ephemeris engine.

tools.name: get_astrology_chart
tools.description: Calculate an astrological chart (Western, Vedic, BaZi) based on birth data.

tools.name: get_astrology_reference
tools.description: Retrieve authentic interpretation guidelines for a specific astrological system.

tools.name: save_profile
tools.description: Save a user's birth profile for future sessions.

tools.name: geocode_city
tools.description: Retrieve latitude, longitude, and timezone for a given city name.

tools.name: get_solar_return
tools.description: Calculate a solar return chart for annual birthday forecasts.

tools.name: get_lunar_return
tools.description: Calculate a lunar return chart for monthly emotional cycle tracking.

tools.name: get_compatibility
tools.description: Calculate detailed 0-100 compatibility scoring between two people.

tools.name: get_navamsa
tools.description: Calculate the Vedic Navamsa (D9) divisional chart.

tools.name: get_panchang
tools.description: Calculate complete Vedic Panchang elements: Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana.

tools.name: get_moon_phase
tools.description: Get moon phase name, illumination %, age, and upcoming lunar events.

tools.name: get_numerology
tools.description: Calculate Life Path number, Personal Year, Expression, and Soul Urge numbers.

tools.name: get_composite_chart
tools.description: Calculate a midpoint composite chart — the relationship as a third entity.

tools.name: get_progressions
tools.description: Calculate secondary progressions (1 day = 1 year of life).

tools.name: get_planetary_return
tools.description: Calculate a planetary return chart for any planet.

tools.name: get_varga
tools.description: Calculate a Vedic divisional chart (D2 through D60).

tools.name: get_planetary_hours
tools.description: Calculate Chaldean planetary hours for a given day and location.

tools.name: get_transit_aspects
tools.description: Get detailed transit-to-natal aspects with impact ratings.
